name: EdwLoadPrvcyRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'PRIVACY' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE t SET t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC t INNER JOIN cte ON t.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND t.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND t.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE t.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N';

Description:
DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.
      
        
MODIFICATIONS:

------------------      ----------------------------     -----------------------------             -------------------------------------------------------------------------------       ----------------------              ----------------------            ----------------------

2013-12-27     Balkarn Gill               5114 - EDW Effiiciencies    Original Programming(Server to Parallel Conversion)     EnterpriseWrhsDevl      Jag Yelavarthi           2014-03-13

Annotations:
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Privacy with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Privacy Load Indicator Update
